articles.title: Italy’s largest bank more than doubles crypto holdings to $235M in Q1: Report
articles.description: Intesa Sanpaolo grew its crypto holdings from $100 million to $235 million in Q1 2026, making first-time moves into Ethereum and XRP while nearly exiting Solana entirely.

articles.title: A Russian stablecoin built to dodge sanctions says it can survive even if they're lifted
